events.name: Boston Celtics at New York Knicks

headlines.description: — Jalen Brunson and the New York Knicks had just taken control of the game with another fourth-quarter kick when Jayson Tatum fell to the court with a potentially severe right leg injury.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks take a 3-1 lead over the Celtics with a 121-113 victory as Tatum is injured in final minutes

events.name: Minnesota Timberwolves at Golden State Warriors

headlines.description: — Anthony Edwards let it fly from 30 feet just before the halftime buzzer and his 3-pointer provided some much-needed momentum that Minnesota took right into a commanding third quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Edwards, Randle lead the way again as Timberwolves beat Warriors 117-110 for 3-1 playoff series lead
